titlebar.profiles_description: Advanced Hermes environments for separate personas, config, skills, and SOUL.md.

sidebar.show_list: Show sessions as a single list
sidebar.all_pinned: Everything here is pinned. Unpin a chat to show it in recents.
sidebar.pin_hint: Shift-click a chat to pin · drag to reorder

boot_failure.title: Hermes couldn't start
boot_failure.description: The background gateway didn't come up. Try one of the recovery steps below — nothing here deletes your chats or settings.
boot_failure.repair_hint: Repair re-runs the installer and can take a few minutes on a fresh machine.

settings.title: Settings
settings.reset_confirm: Reset all settings to Hermes defaults?
settings.language_description: Choose the display language for the Hermes interface.
settings.appearance_description: These are desktop-only display preferences. Mode controls brightness; theme controls the accent palette and chat surface styling.
settings.appearance.color_mode_description: Pick a fixed mode or let Hermes follow your system setting.
settings.appearance.tool_display_description: Product hides raw tool payloads; Technical shows full input/output.
settings.appearance.tool_product_description: Human-friendly tool activity with concise summaries.
settings.appearance.tool_technical_description: Include raw tool args/results and low-level details.
settings.appearance.theme_description: Desktop palettes only. The selected mode is applied on top.

field_desc.model: Used for new chats unless you pick a different model in the composer.
field_desc.model_context_length: Leave at 0 to use the selected model's detected context window.
field_desc.fallback_providers: Backup provider:model entries to try if the default model fails.
field_desc.display.personality: Default assistant style for new sessions.
field_desc.timezone: Used when Hermes needs local time context. Blank uses the system timezone.
field_desc.display.show_reasoning: Show reasoning sections when the backend provides them.
field_desc.agent.image_input_mode: Controls how image attachments are sent to the model.
field_desc.terminal.cwd: Default project folder for tool and terminal work.
field_desc.code_execution.mode: How strictly code execution is scoped to the current project.
field_desc.terminal.persistent_shell: Keep shell state between commands when the backend supports it.
field_desc.terminal.env_passthrough: Environment variables to pass into tool execution.
field_desc.file_read_max_chars: Maximum characters Hermes can read from one file request.
field_desc.approvals.mode: How Hermes handles commands that need explicit approval.
field_desc.approvals.timeout: How long approval prompts wait before timing out.
field_desc.security.redact_secrets: Hide detected secrets from model-visible content when possible.
field_desc.checkpoints.enabled: Create rollback snapshots before file edits.
field_desc.memory.memory_enabled: Save durable memories that can help future sessions.
field_desc.memory.user_profile_enabled: Maintain a compact profile of user preferences.
field_desc.context.engine: Strategy for managing long conversations near the context limit.
field_desc.compression.enabled: Summarize older context when conversations get large.
field_desc.stt.enabled: Enable local or provider-backed speech transcription.
field_desc.stt.elevenlabs.language_code: Optional ISO-639-3 language code. Blank lets ElevenLabs auto-detect.
field_desc.agent.max_turns: Upper bound for tool-calling turns before Hermes stops a run.

chat.mic_in_use: Microphone is already in use by another app.
chat.mic_constraints_unsupported: Microphone constraints are not supported by this device.
chat.mic_not_supported: This runtime does not support microphone recording.

agents.spawn_tree_description: Live subagent activity for the current turn.
agents.no_live_subagents_description: When a turn delegates work, child agents stream their progress here.

about.title: Hermes Desktop
about.status_unsupported: This build can't update itself from inside the app.
about.status_error: We couldn't reach the update server.
about.status_ready: A new update is ready ({{count}} change included).
about.status_ready_plural: A new update is ready ({{count}} changes included).
about.status_check: Tap "Check now" to look for updates.
about.automatic_updates_description: Hermes checks for updates automatically in the background and lets you know when one is ready.
